Pulse 0.4.1

What's new:
- The home screen's More menu now includes direct links to the official Pulse website and GitHub repository, with UTM attribution so visits from the Mac app can be measured separately.
- Settings, search results, and Longbridge connection feedback now transition more smoothly while respecting Reduce Motion preferences.
- The official website now provides a stable latest-download endpoint backed by a verified release mirror and shows the market-data sources Pulse uses.
- Development and release tooling has been cleaned up so builds, notarization, release notes, and generated workspace files have clearer, reproducible paths.

For first-time installation, download Pulse-0.4.1.dmg and drag Pulse to Applications. The zip asset is used by Sparkle automatic updates.
